eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Yavapai, AZ; at 3:39 PM on JUL 4, 2026 Effective until 3:39 PM JUL 5, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Yavapai Sheriff Alert: 07/04/2026 3:35 PM
There is a wildfire near YARNELL. SET Status for YCU-2405. Gather essential supplies. Prepare incase of evacuation. Info: https://go.genasys.com/orsxfr
